name: alibabacloud-governance-evaluation-report
description: Alibaba Cloud Governance Center evaluation report skill. Use for querying governance maturity check results, generating structured risk reports, and account compliance analysis. Triggers: "云治理", "成熟度检测", "合规检查", "安全风险", "治理检测", "governance evaluation", "maturity check", "compliance report", "risk report", "governance center".
